vehicle.model_designation_position: Front, left and right sides of grille (both visible from viewer perspective)
vehicle.viewing_angle: Frontal (slightly left of center, low frontal view)

composition.tractor_only_or_trailer_visible: Tractor unit only, no trailer visible
composition.important_crop_information: Left and right extreme edges of tractor are visible; none of cab roof or bumper is cropped off

company_identity.position: Roof name board, horizontal, center, above windshield
company_identity.appearance: White and gold text on blue board

company_identity.position: Right cab door, vertical/horizontal stacked, right side (from viewer's perspective)

roof_lights.position: On top edge of cab roof, symmetrically spaced above windshield

bumper_lights.position: Front bumper, horizontal row below license plate
bumper_lights.arrangement: Horizontal row with same size, rectangular lens

main_headlights.position: Each side of grille, vertically oriented within main headlight units

windshield_contents: Decorative scalloped curtain, tan color, full width

front_geometry.grille_description: Wide central grille with 7 horizontal silver bars, flanked by additional vertical fin details integrated into lower panels
front_geometry.headlight_description: Vertically stacked, modern angular LED clusters on each side
front_geometry.bumper_description: Integrated, body-colored, with four rectangular auxiliary lights
